Trinity University received 3.36 inches of rain at their weather station between 745 and 915 AM. Road flooded, a few stalled vehicles needed to be towed, and barricades were put up at some campus entrances.

A vehicle was swept off Park Road 37 in high water. The vehicle was located about 1 1/2 miles downstream, however a search for the driver continues.

*** 1 FATAL *** Update to pervious flash flood report from 4 W San Geronimo. A vehicle and driver were swept off Park Road 37 in high water. The vehicle and driver were recovered downstream. One fatality has been confirmed.
Road closure due to flash flooding.
Little Blanco Road is closed/barricaded road due to fast moving water/flooding. Rainfall amounts range from 2 to almost 5 inches over southern Blanco County over the last 3 hours.
